title: Pipeline State
description: Data contract for pipeline_state.json managed by the Orchestrator. Tracks execution state, gate approvals, and artifact locations across all pipeline steps.

pipeline.description: Pipeline identifier. Always 'visual-story' to distinguish from other pipeline state files.

topic.description: The input topic for this pipeline run

language.description: Primary language for the output story

started_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the pipeline run was initiated

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the most recent state update

current_step.description: The step currently being executed or awaiting action (1-9)

last_completed_step.description: The most recently successfully completed step. 0 means no step has completed yet.

gate1_status.description: Gate 1 (Story Arc Approval) status. Separates Step 2 from Step 3.

gate2_status.description: Gate 2 (Final Review) status. Separates Step 7 from pipeline completion.

gate1_feedback.description: Optional human feedback recorded when gate1_status is 'rejected'. Used to re-run Step 2.

gate2_feedback.description: Optional human feedback recorded when gate2_status is 'rejected'. May include beat numbers and revision instructions.

beats.description: Optional snapshot of beat IDs and types from the approved story arc. Populated after Gate 1 approval.

step_artifact.title: Step Artifact
step_artifact.description: Execution record and output pointers for a single pipeline step

name.description: Human-readable name of the step (e.g., 'Deep Research', 'Story Arc Design')

status.description: Current execution status of this step

outputs.description: Relative file paths of artifacts produced by this step (relative to project root)

retry_count.description: Number of times this step has been retried. Maximum 2 retries allowed.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this step reached 'completed' status

step_artifacts.title: Step Artifacts
step_artifacts.description: Artifact records for each pipeline step. Steps 5 and 6 are Phase 2 and absent in Phase 1 runs.

step_1.description: Step 1: Deep Research — Research Agent. Outputs: research_report.md, data_points.json, citations.json

step_2.description: Step 2: Story Arc Design — Story Arc Designer Agent. Outputs: story_arc.json

step_3.description: Step 3: Section Writing — Visual Section Writer Agent (parallel by wave). Outputs: beat_{NN}_{type}.md files

step_4.description: Step 4: Editing and Fact-Check — Editor Agent. Outputs: edited section files, edit_report.md

step_5.description: Step 5: Data Visualization — DataViz Agent (Phase 2). Outputs: viz_{NN}_{type}.js, dataviz_manifest.json

step_6.description: Step 6: Image Curation — Image Curator Agent (Phase 2). Outputs: output/images/, image_manifest.json

step_7.description: Step 7: HTML Assembly — Layout Assembler Agent. Outputs: output/build/story.html
